김남희는 검사청 대변인인 줄 알았다. 저런게 민주당 국회의원이냐. 한심하다

Features millions of blooming roses stretching along the riverside pathways. The park is easily accessible by public transportation, making it a popular destination for both locals and visitors. This is addressed to everyone, but especially Americans under the age of 30:

Read dystopian novels.

bsky.text: So much propaganda is being spread by ICE. They also don’t mention that the 26-year-old man they shot had legal authorization to work in the United States and was not the target of the ICE operation.

bsky.text:

This is what democracy looks like.
